title: Khidkaleshwar Mandir
tagline: Khidkaleshwar Mandir — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Khidkali temple or the Khidkaleshwar Mandir is a Hindu temple located in Dombivli, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: The Khidkali temple or the Khidkaleshwar Mandir is a Hindu temple located in Dombivli, Maharashtra, India. The present temple structure was probably rebuilt in the 17th century. Inside the main temple there are other ancient idols of Lord Ganeśa, Hanumān. The temple is situated on the banks of the Khiḍkali Lake.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Palava City
topPlaces.description: Palava City is a planned urban township near Dombivli in Maharashtra, India. Developed by the Lodha Group, it spans approximately 5,000 acres and is strategically located between Thane, Navi Mumbai, and Kalyan.

topPlaces.name: Kadva River
topPlaces.description: Kadva river is a minor but important tributary of Godavari in Nashik district, Maharashtra, India. It originates and flows through the Dindori Taluka of Nashik District.

topPlaces.name: Darna River
topPlaces.description: Darna is a minor right-bank tributary of the Godavari in the Nashik District, Maharashtra, India. Rising north of the Kalsubai range, it drains Igatpuri, Nashik and Niphad Talukas of Nashik District.

topPlaces.name: Welu River
topPlaces.description: Welu River or Vel River is a tributary of Bhima River in Pune district, Maharashtra, India. It originates and flows through the Ambegaon, Khed, Shirur talukas of Pune district.

topPlaces.name: 2013 Thane building collapse
topPlaces.description: On 4 April 2013, a building collapsed on tribal land in Mumbra, a suburb of Thane in Maharashtra, India. It has been called the worst building collapse in the area.

topPlaces.name: Kausa
topPlaces.description: Kausa is a village of Thane City in the state of Maharashtra in India. It is administered by the Thane Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Parsik Hill
topPlaces.description: Parsik Hill is a hill in the Mumbai metropolitan area, in the Thane district of Maharashtra, India. It has a rail tunnel called Parsik tunnel.

topPlaces.name: Rabale
topPlaces.description: Rabale is a residential area located between the suburbs of Airoli and Ghansoli on the Thane-Belapur road in Navi Mumbai. Rabale Area is well known for the Rabale MIDC area which houses many manufacturing units.

items.note: Palava City is a planned urban township near Dombivli in Maharashtra, India. Developed by the Lodha Group, it spans approximately 5,000 acres and is strategically located between Thane, Navi Mumbai, and Kalyan.
Kadva river is a minor but important tributary of Godavari in Nashik district, Maharashtra, India. It originates and flows through the Dindori Taluka of Nashik District.
Darna is a minor right-bank tributary of the Godavari in the Nashik District, Maharashtra, India. Rising north of the Kalsubai range, it drains Igatpuri, Nashik and Niphad Talukas of Nashik District.
Welu River or Vel River is a tributary of Bhima River in Pune district, Maharashtra, India. It originates and flows through the Ambegaon, Khed, Shirur talukas of Pune district.
On 4 April 2013, a building collapsed on tribal land in Mumbra, a suburb of Thane in Maharashtra, India. It has been called the worst building collapse in the area.
Kausa is a village of Thane City in the state of Maharashtra in India. It is administered by the Thane Municipal Corporation.
Parsik Hill is a hill in the Mumbai metropolitan area, in the Thane district of Maharashtra, India. It has a rail tunnel called Parsik tunnel.

Rabale is a residential area located between the suburbs of Airoli and Ghansoli on the Thane-Belapur road in Navi Mumbai. Rabale Area is well known for the Rabale MIDC area which houses many manufacturing units.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khidkaleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khidkaleshwar Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khidkaleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (22 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khidkaleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khidkaleshwar Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khidkaleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Khidkaleshwar Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khidkaleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palava City, Kadva River, Darna River, Welu River, 2013 Thane building collapse.
